name: EVcouplings
description: Predict protein function and mutations using evolutionary sequence covariation. Generate multiple sequence alignments and infer undirected statistical models from sequence variation. Predict mutation effects from sequence co-variation.
capabilities: Predict protein function and mutations using evolutionary sequence covariation
Generate multiple sequence alignments and infer undirected statistical models from sequence variation
Predict mutation effects from sequence co-variation

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for evolutionary covariation analysis and mutation effect prediction
